questions.question: What two fairly important things are not served at Tel Aviv's 'conceptual dining' restaurant, Cafe Ke'ilu?

What vehicles are thought to have been nicknamed for their designation 'type B, limp'?

What U.S. product is Elastoplast the British equivalent of?
